passive.name: Colossal Smash
passive.description: Every few seconds, Galio's next basic attack deals bonus magic damage in an area.

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} Periodically, '''Galio's''' next [[basic attack]] is empowered to have an {{tip|uncancellable windup}}, gain {{sti|{{as|40% '''bonus''' attack speed}}}} and deal {{pp|15 to 115|color=magic damage}} {{as|(+ 100% AD)}} {{as|(+ 45% AP)}} {{as|(+ 60% '''bonus''' magic resistance)}} {{as|'''modified''' magic damage}} to the target and all enemies near them.
wiki_detail.description2: Whenever '''Galio''' hits at least one enemy {{tip|champion}} or epic {{tip|monster}} with an [[champion ability|ability]], the {{sti|cooldown}} of ''Colossal Smash'' is reduced by 3 seconds. This may occur only once per cast.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Colossal Smash'' can {{tip|critical strike|critically strike}} for {{as|{{critical damage|{{ccd|Galio|crit_base}}|100|base = 100}} AD}} {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} to all targets hit.
wiki_detail.notes:
* {{tip|Spellblade}} does not get converted to magic damage and it will deal its damage only to the primary target.
* The empowered attack will not trigger against [[ward]]s.
* Even if the ability hit is {{tip|spell shield|spell shielded}} ''Colossal Smash's'' cooldown will still be reduced.
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} Every few seconds, {{cis|Galio}} next basic attack is modified to gain {{sti|as|{{as|attack speed}}}} and deal {{as|magic damage}} in an area, increased based on his {{sti|mr|{{as|'''bonus''' magic resist}}}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: '''Galios's''' ability hits against enemy {{tip|champions}} or epic {{tip|monsters}} {{sti|ah|reduce}} ''Colossal Smash's'' {{sti|cd|cooldown}}.

Q.name: Winds of War
Q.description: Galio fires two windblasts that converge into a large tornado that deals damage over time.
Q.tooltip: Galio fires two windblasts that deal {{ qmissiledamage }} magic damage each. When the windblasts meet, they combine into a tornado that deals {{ percentsuperqdamagett }}% max Health magic damage over {{ superqduration }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Galio}} fires two windblasts that converge to the target location, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.blurb2: Upon converging, the blasts form a tornado that continually deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies within, based on each {{as|target's '''maximum''' health}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Galio''' creates two windblasts 250 units to either side of him that arc out before converging to the target location, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to all enemies they pass through.
wiki_detail.description2: When the blasts meet, the gusts form a tornado that persists for 2 seconds, slowly moving forward and dealing {{as|magic damage}} equal to{{ft|{{as|{{fd|2.5}}% {{as|(+ 1% per 100 AP)}} of target's '''maximum''' health}} every {{fd|0.5}} seconds|{{as|10% {{as|(+ 4% per 100 AP)}} of target's '''maximum''' health}} over the duration}}to enemies within the area, capped at{{ft|150 per tick|600 total}}against {{tip|monsters}}.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Winds of War will cast at max range if cast beyond that.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* Deals {{tip|area damage}} on the gust and applies {{tip|persistent area damage}} for the tornado. 
* {{tip|Spell shield}} will block the gusts damage but not the tornado's.
* {{cai|Wind Wall|Yasuo}} and {{cai|Unbreakable|Braum}} can block each windblast individually.
** The tornado will not form if only one windblast reaches the target location.
{{Effect at cast time end}}

W.name: Shield of Durand
W.description: Galio charges a defensive stance, moving slowly. Upon releasing the charge, Galio will taunt and damage nearby enemies.

wiki_detail.description:
{{sbc|Passive:}} '''Galio''' gains ''Anti-Magic Bulwark'', and restores it after {{pp|12 to 8 for 3|1;6;11}} seconds without taking damage.

{{sbc|Anti-Magic Bulwark:}} Gain a {{tip|shield}} that absorbs {{as|magic damage}}.
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Galio''' {{tip|channel|charges}} for up to 2 seconds, {{tip|slow|slowing}} himself by 15%, and gaining {{as|magic damage}} reduction and half of that amount as {{as|physical damage}} reduction; charging increases ''Shield of Durand's'' radius, damage and {{tip|taunt}} duration over the first {{fd|1.25}} seconds of the channel.
wiki_detail.leveling3: {{st|Magic Damage Reduction|{{ap|25 to 45}}% {{as|(+ 4% per 100 AP)}} {{as|(+ 8% per 100 '''bonus''' magic resistance)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|1}}% per 100 '''bonus''' health)}}|Physical Damage Reduction|{{ap|25/2 to 45/2}}% {{as|(+ {{ap|1.5}}% per 100 AP)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|8/2}}% per 100 '''bonus''' magic resistance)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|1/2}}% per 100 '''bonus''' health)}}}}
wiki_detail.description4: ''Shield of Durand'' can be recast within the duration and does so automatically afterwards or if it is {{tip|interrupt|interrupted}}.
wiki_detail.description5: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Galio''' refreshes the [[damage modifier|damage reduction]] for 2 seconds and deals {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemy champions, increased by {{pp|type=channel time|key=%|0 to 200 for 9|0 to 1.25|formula=100%+(25% per 0.16 seconds channeled).}}, as well as {{tip|taunt|taunts}} them for {{pp|type=channel time|0.5 to 1.5 for 9|0 to 1.25|formula=0.5+(0.125 per 0.16 seconds channeled).}} seconds and, after a brief delay, sets their {{sti|ms|{{as|movement speed}}}} to a {{as|static 60|ms}} for the same duration but slightly longer.
wiki_detail.leveling5: {{st|Minimum Magic Damage|{{ap|20 to 60}} {{as|(+ 30% AP)}}|Maximum Magic Damage|{{ap|20*3 to 60*3}} {{as|(+ 90% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{pp|type=channel time|175 to 350 for 9|0 to 1.25|formula=175+(21.875 per 0.16 seconds channeled).}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* '''Galio''' is {{tip|lockout|locked out}} of attacking and casting for {{fd|0.4}} seconds after recasting.
** '''Galio''' may still buffer his actions during this time.
* ''Static movement speed'' cannot be modified by {{sti|movement speed|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} or {{tip|slow resist}}.
** This effect is negated only if the target is {{tip|slow-immune}}.
* The ability key does not need to be held down when buffered in other abilities except {{ai|Winds of War|Galio}}.
* The following table refers for interactions while '''Galio''' is {{tip|channel|channeling}}:
{{ct|charge|attack=false|cast=false|move=true|items=interrupts,true,,false|consume=true|spells=true,false,false,interrupts,false|interrupts=death, silence}}
wiki_detail.tips: * Since ''Anti-Magic Bulwark'' is instantly granted upon learning the ability, the {{tip|shield}} may be gained once per game while in combat.
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive:}} {{ci|Galio}} gains a {{tip|shield}} that absorbs {{as|magic damage}} based on {{as|his '''maximum''' health}}, and restores it while out of combat.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Galio''' {{tip|channel|charges up}} a defensive stance, moving {{tip|slow|slowly}} while gaining damage reduction. ''Shield of Durand'' can be recast within the duration and does so automatically afterward.
wiki_detail.blurb3: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Galio''' {{tip|taunt|taunts}} nearby enemy champions, dealing {{as|magic damage}}. The effects are increased based on charge time.

E.name: Justice Punch
E.description: Galio will briefly step back and charge, knocking up the first enemy champion he encounters.
E.tooltip:
Galio lunges forward with a mighty blow, Knocking Up for {{ knockupduration }} seconds and dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage to the first champion hit. Other enemies in the way take {{ pvedamage }} magic damage.

Galio's dash stops on hitting terrain.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Galio''' {{tip|lunge|steps}} backwards in the opposite direction over the cast time, then {{tip|dash|dashes}} to the target location until he hits an enemy {{tip|champion}} or [[terrain]].
wiki_detail.description2: '''Galio''' deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies he passes through, reduced to 80% against non-champions, and {{tip|airborne|knocks them up}} for {{fd|0.75}} seconds as well as {{tip|standard sight|reveals}} them for the same duration.
wiki_detail.leveling2: {{st|Magic Damage|{{ap|90 to 250}} {{as|(+ 90% AP)}}|Non-Champion Damage|{{ap|90*0.8 to 250*0.8}} {{as|(+ {{ap|90*0.8}}% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description3: ''Justice Punch will cast at max range if cast beyond that.''
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Galio}} will briefly {{tip|lunge|step}} back before {{tip|dash|charging}} to the target location, dealing {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|airborne|knocking up}} enemies he passes through. He will stop upon hitting an enemy {{tip|champion}}.

R.name: Hero's Entrance
R.description: Galio designates an ally's position as his landing spot, granting all allies in the area a magic shield. After a delay Galio smashes down location, knocking up nearby enemies.
R.tooltip:
Galio designates an allied champion's position as his landing spot, granting all allied champions in the area Shield of Durand's passive Shield for {{ temporarywshieldduration }} seconds. Galio then flies to his landing zone.

When Galio lands, he Knocks Up for {{ stundurationouter }} seconds and deals {{ totaldamage }} magic damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Galio}} guards the target allied champion, {{tip|channels|channelling}} for a short time and granting  {{ai|Shield of Durand|Galio|his}} {{as|magic damage}} {{tip|shield}} to himself and all allied {{tip|champions}} in the area.
wiki_detail.blurb2: After a short delay, '''Galio''' rises {{tip|cc-immune|unstoppably}} and {{tip|untargetable|intangibly}} before {{tip|dash|crashing}} down onto the target's initial location, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies and {{tip|airborne|knocking them back}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Galio''' prepares to make an entrance, {{tip|channel|channeling}} for {{fd|2.75}} seconds and designating the target allied {{tip|champion|champion's}} location at the time of cast as his landing spot. Additionally, he resets ''{{ais|Shield of Durand 2|Galio|Shield of Durand}}'' passive shield for himself and grants it to all allied champions within the area for 5 seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: After channeling for {{fd|1.25}} seconds, he gains {{tip|cc-immune|crowd control immunity}} for the remaining duration, becomes {{tip|untargetable}}, and leaps into the air for {{tt|{{fd|0.8 seconds}}|Estimated}} before {{tip|dash|dashing}} to his destination over {{tt|{{fd|0.2 seconds}}|Estimated}}. Afterwards, he lands and becomes targetable again, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to all nearby enemies upon impact, {{tip|airborne|knocking them back}} 100 units over {{fd|0.75}} seconds, and remaining in place for {{tt|{{fd|0.5 seconds}}|Estimated}}.
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Hero's Entrance'' does not resist allied {{tip|crowd control}}.
* '''Galio''' cannot cast ''Hero's Entrance'' on allies he cannot {{tip|sight|see}} while {{tip|Nearsight|nearsighted}}.
* '''Galio''' will still cause an impact to occur at the destination even if he is unable to travel the full distance with the dash (e.g. by {{ais|The Hextech Ultimatum|Camille}} and {{ais|Realm of Death|Mordekaiser}} borders and terrain). '''Galio''' will dash as far as he can go, and thus, does not end the dash prematurely.
* '''Galio''' will always dash 100 units minimum, and dash ''over'' his target's location if they are less than 100 units away from him.
* The following table refers for interactions while '''Galio''' is {{tip|channel|channeling}}:
{{ct|channel|attack=false|cast=false|move=false|items=false, true|spells=true, false, false, false, false|interrupts=death, root, silence, ground}}
* ''Hero's Entrance's'' channel can only be {{tip|interrupt|interrupted}} by {{tip|crowd control}} in the first {{fd|1.25}} seconds.
